mapper.select: /* 로그인 히스토리 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.LOG_ID, A.USER_ID, A.LOGIN_TP, A.ACCESS_TP, A.IP_ADDR, A.USER_AGENT, A.RESULT, A.FAIL_RSON, A.FAIL_CNT, A.TOKEN, A.OTP_STATUS, A.IP_STATUS, DATE_FORMAT(A.CREATE_DT, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DT FROM TB_AUDIT_LOGIN A WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY A.CREATE_DT DESC
